text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, found you. Hey, do you remember what
we talked about the other day?
choice_data_list:
You mean about discovering your womanly
charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! ☆ My search for my inner womanly
charm... And I want you to help out today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All righty... Let's get moving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know what's happening, I'm being pulled
along by the hand until we arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just like that. Focus your mind right down to your
fingertips. Then concentrate on your ears and tail.
Try not to make any unnecessary movements.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee willikers! You look splend'd, Curren! Why,
you're so lov'ly, I've fallen head ov'r heels for ya!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got womanly charm and the means to
show it off! I knew City was the right person to
ask! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: That's City for you. Sigh... With prop'r guidance, I wonder if I can be just as charm'n someday...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Caught your fancy? Want to give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
What?! N-n-n-nooo! I'll pass! I don't wanna get in
th'way!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: But... m-maybe some oth'r time...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Then it's a promise! ☆ Let's all three of us
come up with a pose and take some pics
sometime! ☆

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: S-sure!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get back to it! Maybe a pose like
this next... Trainer, take the pic! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: How about this one, next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Dearie me! You look like the council president.
So polish'd!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Next up... this one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, now you look like Brian! Rough around
th'edges, but so cool!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...As I thought, you really know how to hold
yourself in front of a camera.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! ♪ Now just let me go over the photos
real quick and upload them to Horsegirl...sta...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... And maybe this one for the future...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... #WomanlyCurren #LookinCool
#IsYourHeartPoundingYet?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Zoinkies! You're amazing, Curren! Over ten
thous'nd likes in th'blink of an eye... Ooh, and
you've got comments to boot!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
"My heart's pounding a little different than usual."
"I like Curren Chan cute, but I'm liking this totally
new womanly side of her too!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the comments, it looks like her photos
have been well received. However...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. The photos look great. But... there's
something I can't quite put my finger on...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, I knew it. Something's not right, is it?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But I think you're look'n mighty fine in these
photos. Like a real city girl...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! But still...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I don't know... It's like, is this my kind of womanly charm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tilting her neck in that adorable way of hers,
Curren Chan quietly expresses her doubt.
